notes: Happy path — Hero in BB with As9s, BTN and SB limped, hero raises. Exercises full pipeline to a raise decision.
Happy path — BB with no amount to call, action checks back. Exercises full pipeline to a check decision.
Edge case — Hero already folded; engine must return 'watching'.
Edge case — Action is on another seat; engine must return 'watching'.
Edge case — BTN with weak hand 3h/9s facing no raise; hero folds.
